title: galphimia hirsuta
intro: Galphimia hirsuta, also known as Mexican gentian or bitter galphimia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of anxiety and depression, and reducing inflammation and pain. Galphimia hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
